items.title: This week’s best Apple deals: AirPods Pro 3, Series 11 up to $130 off, MacBook Pro $400 off, Magic Keyboard, more
items.summary: All of this week’s best deals on Apple gear and the best accessories await below. Alongside the ongoing $50 price drop on AirPods Pro 3, we are also tracking the deals in months on AirPods 4 with ANC (or renewed premium down at $119). Those offers join up to $130 off the most popular Apple Watch Series 11 models, high-end MacBook Pro configs up to $400 off, rare all-time lows on Magic Keyboard, and arguably even rarer deals in the Nomad Anniversary sale where you’ll find some of the best Apple accessories in the business.

items.title: EU proposes slowing down cuts to carbon emissions for businesses
items.summary: Under the proposals, the EU plans to relax its emissions trading system to give companies more time to reduce their carbon output.

items.title: ChatGPT is $20 a month, but this app gives you GPT, Claude, and Gemini for a year at $30

items.title: Apple Music is getting a price hike
items.summary: Apple Music is more expensive now. In the US, an individual plan now costs $11.99 per month, a $1 bump up from the previous $10.99 price. A family plan now costs $19.99 per month, up from $16.99, and a student plan costs $6.99 per month, up from $5.99. Apple, in a statement to Music Business […]

items.title: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake quake strikes off Mexico coast
items.summary: The US Tsunami Warning Center issued a warning and has recorded waves 0.3m (1.1 feet) high in Puerto Madero and Chiapas in Mexico.

items.title: Friday’s Android app deals and freebies: Final Fantasy VII, Serial Cleaner, Parabellum, more
items.summary: Your Friday afternoon lineup of the best Android game and app deals has arrived, including titles like Foretales, Looking for Aliens, Serial Cleaner, Parabellum: Siege of Legends, FrogBoy, Zombie Night Terror, Final Fantasy VII, and more. Alongside the ongoing and rare price drop on the official Google Pixel Flex Dual Port 67W USB-C Fast Charger, we also have $300 price drops on Google Pixel 10 Pro and Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at up to $120 off, as well as Acer’s Chromebook Plus 516 laptop with Google AI down at $329. The apps await below.

items.title: I replaced my space heater and ceiling fan with one Dyson appliance
items.summary: Designed for year-round comfort, the Dyson Hot+Cool HF1 combines quiet operation and simple controls with Dyson's signature bladeless design.

items.title: This 25W Baseus MagSafe power bank is a staple in my Apple EDC, now nearly 50% off at $42 low
items.summary: Courtesy of Baseus’ official Amazon storefront, you can now get its PicoGo AM52 10,000mAh Qi2.2 MagSafe power bank for $42.99 shipped. Be sure to enter promo code UTYJDF7V at checkout to see the discounted price. This model regularly sells for $80, so today’s deal takes $37 off and delivers a 46% discount. That marks the lowest price we’ve tracked for this particular version, which pairs 25W Qi2.2 wireless charging with a built-in 45W USB-C cable. We have seen the variant of this power bank without the Type-C cable go for less in the past, but this is the best price we’ve seen on this more convenient model. Head below for more details.

items.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
items.summary: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […]

items.title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
items.summary: Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done. So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight with OpenAI? On this episode of The […]

items.title: Amazon’s coffee deals up to 27% off: 100 K-Cups for $31, Starbucks, Nespresso, Dunkin’, more

If you’re looking to restock your coffee bar for less, Amazon’s latest deals have you covered. Today’s offers deliver up to 27% off a wide selection of coffee and espresso favorites, including Starbucks, Nespresso, Kicking Horse Coffee, Javvy Cold Brew, and Amazon’s own coffee lineup.

Top coffee deals of the day:

  • Starbucks Ground Coffee Medium Roast Variety Pack, 3 Bags 12 oz | 100% Arabica ground coffee; Medium Roast variety pack; 3 bags, 12 oz each (36 oz total) $21.50 (Orig. $27)
  • Starbucks Whole Bean Coffee Pike Place Roast, 28 oz Bag | 100% Arabica whole bean coffee; Medium Roast Pike Place Roast; 1 bag, 28 oz $14 (Orig. $20)
  • Javvy Cold Brew Coffee Concentrate Instant Coffee, Smooth Arabica Iced Coffee & Espresso Concentrate, 35 Servings, Caramel, 1 Pack $19 (Orig. $26)

  • Dunkin’ Hazelnut Flavored Coffee, 128 Keurig K-Cup Pods $87 (Orig. $100)
  • Maxwell House Original Roast Ground Coffee, 33.1 oz Canister $17 (Orig. $20)

In addition to the coffee discounts, Amazon is also offering $10 off when you spend $40 on select grocery items. Eligible brands include ONE protein, San Pellegrino, SkinnyPop, Lavazza Coffee, and more, with the discount applied automatically at checkout on qualifying purchases. items.title: This 3-pack of heavy-duty nylon extension cable/hose straps with metal grommets now just $5
items.summary:
Lamicall 3-pack Heavy-Duty Extension Cord Storage Straps

Buy for $5 (Reg. $12)

Apply NLONU973 during checkout.

What we love

There are loads of more delicate straps and organization solutions for all of your indoor charging cables and EDC needs, but sometimes you need something more robust for extension cables and outdoor power cables, and even hoses. And if you do, I really like the 55-pound capacity, nylon build, and rustproof metal grommets here – especially at $5 for three different sizes.

items.title: Cover storm cleanup, firewood, pruning, more with Greenworks’ 24V 12-inch cordless electric compact chainsaw down at $129
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you can find the popular Greenworks 24V 12-inch Brushless Cordless Compact Electric Chainsaw with 4.0Ah battery at $129 shipped, beating out the direct Greenworks website by $14. While it carries a $200 MSRP, at Amazon, we haven’t really seen it go higher than $179 lately, while discounts have mostly dropped the costs to $150 and $143, though there have been recent falls to $129, as well as $126 and $120 back during Prime Day. The deal here cuts $50 off the going rate ($71 off the MSRP) landing it just $9 above the June Prime Day 2026 low. There’s tons of other Greenworks tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.summary:
Fanttik B10 Pro USB-C Rechargeable Air Duster

Buy for $34 (Reg. $45)

What we love

We’ve frequently spot similar pricing from lesser-known brands, but today’s offer is on a Fanttik-made model. This is a brand that often has me turning my head as it comes up with more and more handy and nice-looking USB-C rechargeable tools. So if you have some tech that could use a quick clean up every now and then, I say ditch canned air and grab this instead.

Over at Amazon, it only really climbs as high as $1,400 these days, with discounts having dropped the price between $1,300 and $1,100, until last month’s Prime Day promotions saw it fall to a new $950 low. If you missed out last month, you’re getting the next-best price here with $300 off the going rate and $400 off the MSRP.

The portable air compressor I have in my collection of tools is easily one of my favorites. It’s incredibly easy to hook it up, dial in the preferred PSI, and let it do the rest. This offering can do that very same trick for $32 right now.

items.summary: Prosecutors accused 21-year-old student Zyaire Wilkins of publishing on Steam several fake video games that contained malware, infecting thousands of victims, and stealing crypto from some of them.

Down from its $2,400 MSRP, discounts before June only saw things go as low as $1,800, which is where this e-bike’s red colorway model is sitting. items.title: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
